title: Execution: Corpus Ratification with MODIFY Conditions Satisfied
actionTaken: Accepted MODIFY recommendation from real governance engine (v2 evaluation). All four conditions satisfied: (1) Fixed klages-mundt-dao-governance-mechanisms.txt — replaced FocalMix medical paper with correct Klages-Mundt stablecoins governance paper. (2) Spot-checked all Tier 3 files — discovered and fixed second corrupted file (dao-survey-2022.txt was quantum physics paper, replaced with correct DAO overview). (3) Regenerated corpus manifest hash after corrections. (4) Added US Constitution (Articles I-VII + Bill of Rights) to tier-2-civic, closing the known gap identified by the engine.

modifyConditions.condition4_usConstitution: SATISFIED — added same day (Articles I-VII + Amendments I-X)

note: Decision #3 is the v2 re-evaluation of Proposal #2 through the real corpus-grounded governance engine. Original Decision #2 (session-based, APPROVE/88) remains on-chain as historical record. Decision #3 (engine-based, MODIFY/88) supersedes it.
